_meta.name: RobloxXea — Curated Main Tools
_meta.description: Production-ready JSON of real, publicly available Roblox scripting tools with working GitHub loadstrings. Each entry is verified against its open-source repository. Replace toolImage URLs with hosted assets as desired — the ToolCard component falls back to a letter avatar when an image fails to load.
_meta.license: Data is composed from publicly available open-source repositories (MIT / GPL / unlicensed). Respect each tool's individual license.

tools.name: Infinite Yield
tools.author: EdgeIY
tools.description: The most popular universal admin command script for Roblox. Provides 100+ commands including fly, noclip, teleport, player lookups, and an extensive command-line interface. Actively maintained for years.

tools.name: Unnamed ESP
tools.author: ic3w0lf22
tools.description: A high-performance universal ESP (Extra Sensory Perception) script that draws boxes, names, tracers, and health bars over players using the Drawing API. Renowned for its clean codebase and low frame impact.

tools.name: SimpleSpy
tools.author: exxtremewaare
tools.description: A lightweight yet powerful RemoteEvent / RemoteFunction spy. Logs every remote call with arguments, allows you to block, modify, and re-fire remotes. Includes a clean UI and Lua code generation for replaying calls.

tools.name: Hydroxide
tools.author: Upbolt
tools.description: An all-in-one development toolkit for Roblox scripters. Combines a remote spy, upvalue scanner, constant dumper, and instance explorer. The de-facto standard for reverse-engineering game logic and building automation scripts.

tools.name: Fates Admin
tools.author: fatesc
tools.description: A modern, plugin-based admin command framework. Features a polished UI, customizable command set, permission tiers, and an extension API for writing your own commands. Open-source and highly modular.

tools.name: Dark Dex V3
tools.author: MuhmdHosny
tools.description: A dark-themed fork of the classic Dex Explorer with an updated UI, faster instance tree navigation, property inspector, and remote spying integration. Ideal for inspecting the DataModel of any game.

tools.name: CMD-X
tools.author: frappe
tools.description: A sleek command-bar-style admin UI optimized for one-handed mobile use. Includes a search-driven command palette, quick-action buttons, and a favorites system. Frequently updated with new commands.

tools.name: ReSpy
tools.author: rskdev
tools.description: A minimalist remote spy focused on raw speed and clarity. Captures RemoteEvent and RemoteFunction traffic with a clean filterable log view, and exports any captured call as a ready-to-paste Luau snippet.

tools.name: Owl Hub
tools.author: owlhub
tools.description: A curated multi-game script hub providing universal aimbot, silent aim, ESP, and farm automation for a roster of supported titles. Acts as a launcher — you select your game and the matching module loads automatically.

tools.name: Drawing Reborn
tools.author: Mojomaster123
tools.description: A polyfill library that re-implements the exploit-only Drawing API on top of standard Roblox ScreenGui objects. Lets you write Drawing-API-compatible ESP and overlay code that also runs in regular Studio plugins or non-exploit environments.

tools.name: Instance Rebuilder (IRB)
tools.author: memcorrupt
tools.description: Reconstructs and dumps any Roblox instance tree as copy-pasteable Luau code. Useful for reproducing remote-call flows, replicating UI templates, and scripting against unknown game structures you discover while exploring.

tools.name: KeyAuth Demo
tools.author: KeyAuth
tools.description: Reference implementation of the KeyAuth authentication SDK for Roblox. Demonstrates how to gate a script behind a license-key check, manage user sessions, and pull server-side variables. Useful template for script developers shipping paid tools.
